output.schema_yml_content:
version: 2

models:
  - name: stg_venues
    description: Staged venue data from ticketing source.
    columns:
      - name: venue_id
        description: Unique venue identifier.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: venue_name
        description: Display name of the venue.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_capacity
        description: Maximum seating capacity of the venue.
      - name: city
        description: City where the venue is located.
      - name: state
        description: State or province where the venue is located.
      - name: country
        description: Country where the venue is located.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the venue record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null

version: 2

models:
  - name: int_venues_enriched
    description: Venues enriched with region and timezone data.
    columns:
      - name: venue_id
        description: Unique venue identifier.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: venue_name
        description: Display name of the venue.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_capacity
        description: Maximum seating capacity of the venue.
      - name: city
        description: City where the venue is located.
      - name: state
        description: State or province where the venue is located.
      - name: country
        description: Country where the venue is located.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: region
        description: Geographic region derived from country and state.
      - name: timezone
        description: Timezone of the venue location.
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the venue record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null

version: 2

models:
  - name: fct_event_sales
    description: Fact table for event ticket sales with venue details.
    columns:
      - name: event_sale_id
        description: Unique identifier for the event sale.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: event_date
        description: Date of the event.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_id
        description: Foreign key to the venue dimension.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_name
        description: Display name of the venue.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_capacity
        description: Maximum seating capacity of the venue. Nullable for venues without reported capacity.
      - name: ticket_count
        description: Number of tickets sold.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: gms
        description: Gross merchandise sales amount.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the sale record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null

decision_log.decision: Updated schema.yml for all 3 models with venue_capacity column
decision_log.rationale: Column is nullable (3% null rate) so no not_null test added. Description explains the business meaning. Placed after venue_name in column order.

alternatives_considered.reason: Skipped — 3% null rate indicates intentional nulls for venues without reported capacity
